name: Azorella Nightstand Oak Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Enhance the elegance and functionality of your bedroom with this Azorella Oak Nightstand from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. The square nightstand strikes a clean-lined silhouette with carved, knotted detailing on the front that complements a wide range of design aesthetics and color palettes. The tabletop and lower shelf are perfect for placing decorative items, framed photographs and more, while the pull-out drawer provides room for nighttime essentials.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
